name: Runner marketing page (/runner)
description: Public Qontinui Runner marketing page. Adoption-sweep port of marketing.spec.ts 'Runner Page (/runner)' describe block (structural half: hero title, feature cards, How-It-Works, security/code-signing section, download CTA). 'loads without 500' is covered by the C8 crawl + the run-level HTTP-500 invariant; this spec adds the structural element-presence assertions. Element ids captured from a ci-bot CI element-dump: heading-1-qontinui-runner is the hero H1; the AI-assisted-development features H2, How-It-Works H2, and Security/Code-Signing H2 are the stable section anchors; the hero download CTA links resolve. Public page (renders authed or unauth). Read-only; structural only.

states.name: Hero section
states.description: Hero H1 + download CTA. Ports marketing.spec.ts:142/155/199 (loads + hero title + Download Now CTA).

states.name: Content sections
states.description: Stable narrative section headings: the features H2, How-It-Works H2, and the Security & Code-Signing H2. Ports marketing.spec.ts:168/217/232 (feature cards + How it works + Security section).
